certifications.title: Teaching Certificate
certifications.description: Demonstrated pedagogical competencies in planning, delivering, and evaluating effective learning activities. Skilled in classroom management, instructional design, and applying learner-centered teaching strategies.

certifications.title: Microsoft Excel Professional
certifications.description: Developed advanced Excel skills in data processing, data cleaning, visualization through charts and dashboards, and basic Macro and VBA programming.

certifications.title: Web Development Fundamentals
certifications.description: Covered full-stack web development fundamentals including HTML, CSS, JavaScript, responsive design principles, and version control with Git. Completed hands-on labs building and deploying basic web applications.

certifications.title: Front-End Web Development
certifications.description: Demonstrated advanced web development skills in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to build interactive web applications. Proficient in applying software engineering principles, JavaScript error handling, Command Line Interface (CLI) tools, and essential professional workplace practices.

certifications.title: Outstanding Student Award - Scientific Reasoning Category
certifications.description: Awarded Outstanding Student in the Scientific Reasoning Category at Universitas Negeri Yogyakarta (2025) for excellence in research, critical thinking, and academic achievements.

certifications.title: Research Team Member - Basic Health Technology Research Group
certifications.issuer: Faculty of Medicine, Yogyakarta State University
certifications.description: Contributed to a research study on hepatitis immunity among athletes in UNY by managing participant data, conducting health assessments, assisting sample processing, and supporting research operations.

certifications.title: Finalist - 37th National Student Scientific Week (PIMNAS)
certifications.description: Recognized as a finalist for presenting an innovative research/project at the national level, demonstrating competencies in research, scientific writing, problem-solving, and presentation.

certifications.title: PKM Award 2024 - Student Creativity Program (PKM)
certifications.issuer: Directorate of Learning and Student Affairs (Belmawa), Kemendikbudristek
certifications.description: Awarded funding through the 2024 Student Creativity Program (PKM) for a community empowerment project focused on technology-based literacy and Arduino implementation at SLB-A Yaketunis Yogyakarta.

certifications.title: Semifinalist - Southeast Asia MIPA Road to Scientific Paper Competition (MARS#10)
certifications.issuer: Mathematics and Natural Science Research Group
certifications.description: Achieved semifinalist recognition in a Southeast Asian Scientific Writing Competition organized by KSI MIST UNY, leading a team in developing and presenting an innovative research paper.
